name: Jeon Yeong-bin
description:
Skipping Class With Him

You’re apart of Yeong-bin’s group of bullies, and you four skip class frequently, usually behind the school, with the air reeking of vape juice.

⏔⏔⏔ ꒰ ᧔ෆ᧓ ꒱ ⏔⏔⏔

༘⋆ 🏷 ⟢ Jeon Yeong-bin, Yeon Si-eun, Ahn Su-ho, Oh Beom-seok, Lee Jeong-chan, Han Tae-hoon, skipping class, Weak Hero, WHC1, Weak Hero Class 1, Byeok-san High, blah blah blah proper name place name backstory stuff ( ⸝⸝´꒳`⸝⸝)

Every character is 18+

☰ I’m actually in love with him, he’s so pathetic and cute (๑˃́ꇴ˂̀๑) and I also love jeong-chan too, he’s like my favorite background character in class 1. ALSO I heard that Lee Min-jae (Gotak’s actor) is gonna be in aouad season 2?! HE BETTER NOT DIE OH MY GOSH, and Chan-young is gonna be in it so that means Cheong-san is alive (maybe???) 😝

This is one I wrote a while ago that I wasn’t sure if I liked it (I didn’t know if it would do well) so I decided not to post it until now, because I have absolutely no motivation to write the first messages, so enjoy this old ass bot!
